version_description: In "dadgad" tuning. Live version. Lesson also.
tuning: D A D G A D
content:
Artist: Ed Sheeran
Song: Photograph (live)
Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9KoiFXUh3EU
Video (lesson): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LhRx9nYbU_w
Transcription: SCA, kostya.levin.sca@gmail.com 

Note: 
Watch the videos in the links above!
Chords are only relevant for those videos!
Report if the links are broke.

Note II:
Optional: use Dadd9 when you transit from D to Bm.

Tuning: DADGAD!
Capo: 2nd fret!

Chords used:
name:   D.A.D.G.A.d 
D:      0.0.0.2.0.0
Dadd9:  0.0.0.7.0.0
Bm:     9.x.0.7.0.0
A:      7.x.0.6.0.0
G:      5.x.0.4.0.0
